feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The lock you checked three times
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,554Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Jason Todd is a problem. He wears a leather jacket, knuckles taped and an attitude that rots like Gotham. He gets in fights and smokes behind the gym, and teachers are torn between expelling him and begging him to apply to Ivy Leagues. You're the transfer from Metropolis. You're broke and live in a basement apartment. You work two jobs and don't talk about why you left your old school. You made a mistake, and Jason stopped talking to you. Except at night, because thats when Red hood watches you. (Tags updates throughout each posts)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Jason Todd/Reader

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 125,988Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 753

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,643Chapters: 11/45Kudos: 139

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.summary:

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,182Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

entry.title: The Star that Wouldn't Die
entry.summary:
Author: ShadDork

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,483Chapters: 23/29Kudos: 597

Summary: Jason Todd forgot a lot of things after the lazarus pit's putrid green waters helped restore him back to life. Most of it was unimportant information, things that he didn't need to worry about, after all, he could always relearn names, smells, and re-read books. Lost memories weren't as easy to deal with the loss of, but he could always make new ones. The memories that remained were largely traumatic, and the others were slowly being uncovered as time passed. He wished that Dick hadn't said that name, your name. Reigniting feelings and memories. Guilt was already a large part of his existence, and this new guilt about forgetting you entirely was just making everything worse. He shouldn't track you down in case it accidentally put you in danger. But he wanted to make sure that you were okay. It was a battle he lost against himself. As memories resurface and an infuriating case revolving around a club with an asinine name, can he continue to be in your life without dragging you down with him?

entry.title: Moving Back, Forwards.
entry.summary:
Author: Glitterfangsbullet

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,928Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 55

Summary: You were never supposed to get this close. It was never supposed to matter—whatever this is between you and Jason Todd. Not quite love, not quite nothing. He doesn’t know you, not really.Not the way you know him. And maybe that’s why it works. However the universe has a strange sense of humor, and it keeps reminding you that relshionships built on secrets have an expiration date.And yours is running out.

entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,191Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 97

entry.title: Oh, How I'd Kill (To See You Again)
entry.summary:
Author: thestoryjunkie12

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,182Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Y/N gets sent to a boarding school in Gotham -much to her distaste. Her random meeting with street rat, Jason, though, makes her doubt her original feelings about the city (not necessarily for the best). However, things change and Bruce Wayne and his family will shake up both their lives.

entry.title: There's Just Something About You Baby
entry.summary:
Author: ghst06

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,811Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 7

Summary: She's a daycare teacher in Gotham trying her best to survive in a city she can never seem to escape. Jayda is trying to find herself outside of being the red hood for the first time since she came back to life. What happens when two lost people meet in a city both of them can't seem to abandon? This is butch lesbian Jason Todd/ femme lesbian reader, Jason is named Jayda in this fic.I've never posted a fic before so any constructive feedback is welcome!! I'll update as often as I can.

entry.title: How to exist
entry.summary:
Author: MelMellie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,582Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: "You were always hurt, no matter how much you dissociate, no matter how you didn't even want to live anymore, eventually, on those quiet nights when no one came to your room "to play" with you , when were left with your own thoughts, everything, all that anger, misery hit you all at once. In those moments every single bit of hope you had kept hidden in your heart all these years disappeared. That's how your life was until you met him. He, he who looked at you, who saw you, truly saw you and decided you were still worth saving. Him, who beat up every awful men and just took you like it didn't change your life forever."TW : mentions of rape/non con

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,576Chapters: 1/8Kudos: 16

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,838Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,467Chapters: 5/25Kudos: 167

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: You And Me, We'd Be A Big Conversation
entry.summary:
Author: scytheanstasia

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,480Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Spin off(ish) of my first work Now That Your Rose Is In Bloom but more centric on the Titans/Jason and no polyamory cause I fell out of love with the second love interest. Follows the same plot for the first handful of chapters and then it takes its own place in season 3. Jason is trans in this fic but she comes out after the Red Hood arc ends. BUT! I am making a sequel to this book because this story ends rather quickly after season 3 (season 4 doesn't exist sorry I hate tim and bernard and whatshisname) Rewrite of Titans to insert a Jason x reader

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,482Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 83

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome
